Driver and management functions for ICE40LP and Sharp LS013B7DH01 displays, with display driver header.

## Folders
- **[ice40lp](ice40lp/README.md)**: Driver and management functions for the ICE40LP display, including boot sequence and color handling.
- **[sharp_ls013b7dh01](sharp_ls013b7dh01/README.md)**: Driver implementations and header for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display, managing SPI, DMA, and display states.

## Files
- **[display.h](display.h.md)**: Header file for display driver functions and structures, including initialization and screen updates.
